name: property managers processing 5–15 rental applications/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 rental applications/month, inconsistent document formats cause delays in processing applications. We convert real estate documents into standardized listings and rental applications instead of manual document formatting and entry.
problem_solved: Inconsistent document formats lead to delays in processing applications.
